---
title: "Syllabus"
---

## Course Description

Provide a brief description of the course.

## Learning Objectives

By the end of this course, students will be able to:

1. Objective 1
2. Objective 2
3. Objective 3

## Requirements

- **Participation**: 10%
- **Problem sets**: 40%
- **Final paper / project**: 50%

## Schedule

| Week | Date | Topic | Reading |
|------|------|-------|---------|
| 1 | | Introduction | |
| 2 | | Topic 2 | |

## Policies

**Attendance**: Regular attendance is expected.

**Academic integrity**: All submitted work must be your own.

**Accessibility**: Please contact the instructor if you need accommodations.
